panels.title: Watcher alive
panels.description: YES if the watcher has polled in the last 5 minutes. Calculated as: (current time − last poll timestamp) < 300 seconds.

panels.title: Vault healthy
panels.description: Whether the vault is considered healthy by VaultHub (isVaultHealthy on-chain).

panels.title: Unfinalized requests
panels.description: Number of withdrawal requests in the queue not yet finalized on L1.

panels.title: Inactive ETH
panels.description: ETH in the vault that is not yet staked (available minus staged). Used for withdrawals and rebalancing.

panels.title: Withdrawal deficit
panels.description: ETH needed from validators to cover pending withdrawals (0 = enough liquidity)

panels.title: Total value
panels.description: Total value of the vault (VaultHub totalValue) in ETH.

panels.title: Available balance
panels.description: ETH available in the StakingVault (liquid, not yet staged for staking).

panels.title: Staged balance
panels.description: ETH staged in the StakingVault (pending to be staked).

panels.title: Withdrawable value
panels.description: ETH that can be withdrawn (VaultHub withdrawableValue).

panels.title: Node Operator fee
panels.description: Undisbursed node operator fee accrued in Dashboard (accruedFee).

panels.title: Staking efficiency
panels.description: % of vault ETH actively staked and generating yield. Computed as (total_value − inactive_eth) / total_value × 100.

panels.title: Contracts
panels.description: Contract addresses. Click an address to open in the block explorer.

panels.title: stETH Minted
panels.description: % of stETH minting capacity used (liabilityShares / mintingCapacityShares)

panels.title: Forced rebalance threshold
panels.description: If Health Factor falls below 100% (based on this threshold), the vault is subject to forced rebalancing

panels.title: Reserve ratio
panels.description: % of Total Value reserved as collateral; stETH cannot be minted against this amount

panels.title: Health shortfall
panels.description: Shares needed to restore health (0 = healthy)

panels.title: PDG Policy
panels.description: Dashboard policy for PDG flow: 0=STRICT, 1=ALLOW_PROVE, 2=ALLOW_DEPOSIT_AND_PROVE.

panels.title: PDG Total
panels.description: Total guarantee balance in PDG for this vault node operator.

panels.title: PDG Locked
panels.description: Guarantee currently locked by active predeposits.

panels.title: PDG Unlocked
panels.description: Guarantee available for new predeposits (total - locked).

panels.title: PDG Pending activations
panels.description: Validators in PREDEPOSITED/PROVEN stages awaiting activation.
